title: Newgen Software Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Newgen Software Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Newgen Software Asia Pacific Associates. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Full Stack Developer to strengthen our Indore-based team.

About Newgen Software Asia Pacific Associates:
Newgen Software Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Newgen Software Asia Pacific Associates!
